raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Legislature passed Assembly Bill (AB) 2683 to equip college students with greater protections against sexual violence.",
    "AB 2683 requires universities to annually train their students on sexual violence and sexual harassment.",
    "According to the 2019 Campus Climate Survey on Sexual Assault and Misconduct, an average of 13% of undergraduate students nationwide experienced non-consensual sexual contact.",
    "Recent studies suggest that up to one-third of undergraduate women experience non-consensual sexual contact.",
    "Victims of sexual violence often experience multiple behavioral, emotional, academic, or professional consequences.",
    "Many existing trainings focus solely on the prevention of sexual violence and do not address what to do after an incident.",
    "Data from the National Crime Survey indicates that greater levels of perceived social support are connected to victims being more likely to report a crime.",
    "AB 2683 aims to increase students' knowledge about sexual violence and the resources available to victims."
  ]
}
```
